newIssues.title: German-first product serves English knowledge base (L-001 + L-002)
KB substance naming + duplication inconsistency across three stores (L-003)

recommendations: Localize the KB to German or store *_de/*_en and select by Accept-Language; no silent machine translation of clinical content
Stopgap: flag/hide English KB content in the German UI until localized
Reconcile the three KB stores: canonical German display name + language-neutral substanceId; de-duplicate legacy rows
Replace free-text English frequency with controlled SideEffectFrequency vocabulary
Add a shared compact .tag primitive and migrate one-off badges
Add i18n lint/CI: fail on de===en multiword keys (allowlist proper nouns) + DB content-language check in seed pipeline
